calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming A Trust Asset; Declaration Of Peter J. Tamases In Support Of Petition; Points And Authorities.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Advanced From Jan-14-14 To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming A Trust Asset; Declaration Of Peter J. Tamases In Support Of Petition; Points And Authorities.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Jerome Dorton.

Mr. Tamases stated that his Client was not present but that the Brother and Sister were. Mr. Tamases also explained that Mr. Dorton works in San Francisco, that he stays at the Mother's home and that the trust is administered in San Francisco. The Court accepts jurisdiction and noted that there is no objection. The court granted the Petition for Order Confirming a Trust Asset, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
